message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #b00000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #b00000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #888888
  NoteBackgroundColor #ffffe6
  ArrowColor #000000
}

actor Main as Main

participant "YAMLConfiguration" as YAMLConfiguration
participant "BufrParser" as BufrParser
participant "DataContainer" as DataContainer
participant "IodaEncoder" as IodaEncoder

Main -> YAMLConfiguration : YAMLConfiguration(confPath)
Main -> BufrParser : BufrParser(conf)
Main -> BufrParser : parse
activate BufrParser
note right of BufrParser
  See Query Collecting Data sequence.
end note
BufrParser -> DataContainer : DataContainer()
Main <-- BufrParser : dataContainer
deactivate BufrParser

Main -> IodaEncoder : IodaEncoder(conf)
Main -> IodaEncoder : encode(dataContainer)
activate IodaEncoder
note right of IodaEncoder
  See Query Getting Data sequence.
end note
deactivate IodaEncoder
@enduml
